blocks.name: Direct Lithium Extraction
blocks.description: Selective Li+ sorption column (Langmuir + LDF, cycle-averaged).

blocks.name: Activated Carbon Adsorption
blocks.description: Fixed-bed GAC micropollutant removal (Freundlich isotherm, EBCT).

blocks.name: Crystallizer
blocks.description: Cooling/evaporative crystallization of salt from supersaturated brine.

blocks.name: Chemical Precipitation Reactor
blocks.description: Reagent dosing to precipitate hardness / metals as sludge.
